title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 370.210 - Compensation not allowed for board of directors — approval of other salaries required
text:
370.210.  Compensation not allowed for board of directors — approval of other salaries required. — 1.  No member of the board of directors or of the credit or supervisory committees shall receive any compensation for his services as a member of the board or committee.
  2.  No salary shall be paid any officer or other employee of a credit union except such as may have been duly approved by the board of directors.
(RSMo 1939 § 5529, A.L. 1972 S.B. 502, A.L. 1982 H.B. 1099) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 5087
